author: Faycal Farhat
name: PMI-Spine Local-Global Muon
blurb: Non-record 8xH100 10-minute SP1024 run for a bifurcated local-global recurrent LM with full-resolution local windows, pooled global summaries, PMI/SPINE basis projection, pointer-copy logit merge, lag-interferometer residuals, explicit hidden-matrix Muon taxonomy, stabilized Gram-NS, same-shape batching, and int4+zlib roundtrip export. Final exact int4+zlib roundtrip val_bpb is 1.25425389 under the 16MB artifact cap.
